title: lannea malifolia
intro: Lannea malifolia, also known as the Wild Plum, is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, and is known to be effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lannea malifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's parts are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
